fragment:
<set-variable name="model-tier" value="@{
		var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown").ToLower();
		var models = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-models");
		
		var tier = models?[modelId]?["tier"]?.ToString();
		return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(tier) ? tier : "standard";
	}" />
	
	<set-variable name="token-limit-key" value="@{
		var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", "none");
		var tier = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-tier", "standard");
		
		if (authType.Equals("jwt", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
			var userId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "anonymous");
			return $"uaig-jwt-{userId}-{tier}";
		}
		if (authType.Equals("api-key", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
			return $"uaig-sub-{context.Subscription?.Id ?? "anonymous"}-{tier}";
		}
		return $"uaig-ip-{context.Request.IpAddress}-{tier}";
	}" />
	
	
		@($"UAIG - Token limits applied for {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-tier", "standard")} tier model {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-id", "unknown")}")
	
	
	
		<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("model-tier", "standard").Equals("premium", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
			<llm-token-limit
				counter-key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("token-limit-key", "default-key"))"
				tokens-per-minute="2000"
				token-quota="10000"
				token-quota-period="Hourly"
				estimate-prompt-tokens="false" />
		
		
			
			<llm-token-limit
				counter-key="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("token-limit-key", "default-key"))"
				tokens-per-minute="1000"
				token-quota="5000"
				token-quota-period="Hourly"
				estimate-prompt-tokens="false" />
